name: Pine Nut Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, lightly toast the pine nuts in the butter until golden brown. Remove from heat and let cool on paper towels.
2. Cook the alphabet pasta in boiling water according to package instructions. Drain well and rinse under cold water. Be careful not to overcook the pasta.
3. Gently mix together all ingredients in a large bowl, ensuring that all components are evenly incorporated. Cover the bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.
